Who we are

A cross-domain team that delivers results.

SenKulex is a hands-on partner in every project: product, copy, automation, launch. We work toward outcomes, not billable hours.

01

Results

We see every project through to a concrete outcome — MVP, launch, first customers.

02

Two markets

Belgium and Ukraine at once — we understand both contexts.

03

Social + business

We don't separate "for good" from "for profit" — we look for projects where both align.

Looking for partners

If you have an idea, let's talk.

From a rough sketch to a working MVP. Especially interested in topics at the intersection of Belgium and Ukraine: migration, legalization, access to services, digital safety, business support.

Format 01

Joint launch

You bring the expertise, we bring the product, packaging and automation.

Format 02

Consulting & packaging

We turn your idea into a working product, end to end.

Format 03

Just a conversation

Not sure exactly what you need yet? That's fine — let's talk it through.
